stemHtml:
A pilot plans a VFR flight on a dry summers day. The pilot chooses to navigate using features such as rivers, roads, railways, and windmills. Which of the following can make VFR navigation referring to these features on the chart more difficult?
1. Many parallel roads in densely populated urban areas
2. Large asphalt roads covered in dust
3. Railway lines shown on the chart but WITHOUT detailed information
4. Numerous windmills in the area overflown, including ones not shown on the chart.
